---
title: "Class 11: Writing a Preregistration"
bibliography: ../references.bib
---

```{r slides-videos, echo=FALSE, include=FALSE}
source(here::here("R", "slide-things.R"))
```

::: {.callout-caution}
## Ups, there is no content here yet. 

All materials, slides and assignments will be uploaded on the day of the class `r emoji::emoji("clock")` 
:::
